metadata.note: V-T8 pact: pricing-promo prices a cart_id (01 §1 'pricing-promo'; D10). This pins the read contract pricing depends on: GET /v1/carts/{cart_id} must return the cart's subtotal as Money (integer minor units + ISO currency) so the quote engine can price fees/discounts/total against it. When a request carries an explicit subtotal, pricing skips this read (02 §5 additive); otherwise it consumes this exact interaction. File-based broker, verified against the REAL cart booted by ci/pact-verify.sh, which pre-seeds crt_01hpactpricing0000000000000 with one line (provider state). The subtotal Money (amount + currency) + cart_id are pinned.

interactions.description: read a cart's subtotal to price a quote
interactions.providerState: a cart crt_01hpactpricing0000000000000 exists with subtotal 16000 THB
